title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
